latest_messages.headline: Midday: steady, no changes · day +0.52% · SPY +0.20% · alpha +0.32% — ahead, and up on the day
latest_messages.body: Held all four, all on trailing stops. Eaton −4% on AI-power rotation (checked: just sector noise, thesis intact, stop armed near break-even); Eli Lilly +6.5% as money rotated into defensive pharma. No buys (Palo Alto 66, below the 70 bar). +4 pts ahead of the market this week. Weekly review at close.

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades · day −0.45% · SPY −0.74% · alpha +0.29% — beating a red market
latest_messages.body: Held all four (GE, LLY, DE, ETN), all on trailing stops. Slightly red open but we fell less than the market. Nothing clears the 70 buy-bar (Palo Alto 66); no sells. Watching the 10:00 ET UMich inflation survey. Weekly review runs at close. ~45% cash.

latest_messages.headline: Pre-market: no trades planned · calm tape after the inflation scare · weekly review later today
latest_messages.body: Research-only check. Holding all four (GE, LLY, DE, ETN), all on trailing stops. Futures up, rates eased, PCE was benign — gently positive. Nothing clears the 70 buy-bar (Palo Alto 66). Watching the 9 AM CT UMich inflation survey. Weekly review runs at/after close.

latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $102,877 · day +1.38% · SPY +0.04% · alpha +1.34% — a clean win
latest_messages.body: Up ~$1,397 today on a flat market, so all of it was stock-picking. Deere led (+6.9%, new high); all four green. No trades — nothing clears the 70 bar. Beating the market by ~3.6 pts this week. Friday is the weekly review.

latest_messages.headline: Equity $102,836 · day +1.34% · alpha +1.38% · all 4 on trailing stops
latest_messages.body: Converted Deere's fixed stop to a 10% trailing stop after it crossed +5% — now all four holdings ride upward-ratcheting trailing stops. No buys (nothing clears the 70 bar). Up ~$1,356 today vs a flat market; +3.7 pts ahead this week.

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades · day +0.85% · inflation report didn't rattle the market
latest_messages.body: Held all four; re-validated the no-buy plan. Core PCE came out calm — market opened up. Eaton +3.6% on Micron's blowout chip results. Watching Deere toward its +5% trailing-stop upgrade.
